profile.full_name.description: The user's preferred full name for addressing them and filling forms.

profile.first_name.description: The user's preferred first or given name.

profile.last_name.description: The user's preferred last or family name.

profile.email.description: The user's preferred contact email for forms and communication.

profile.badge_name.description: The name the user prefers on badges, labels, or short-form introductions.

profile.company.description: The user's current organization or company for profile and form filling.

profile.title.description: The user's current role, title, or job function for profile and form filling.

system.response_tone.description: The personality and formality level the AI should use when responding.

system.response_length.description: Preferred length of AI responses - brief for quick answers, detailed for thorough explanations.

food.dietary_restrictions.description: Food allergies, intolerances, dislikes, or diet plans the user follows (e.g., vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, kosher, halal).

food.cuisine_preferences.description: Types of cuisine the user enjoys or prefers (e.g., Italian, Japanese, Mexican).

food.spice_tolerance.description: How much spice/heat the user prefers in their food.

dev.tech_stack.description: Preferred programming languages, frameworks, and tools the user works with.

dev.coding_style.description: Coding conventions and style preferences (e.g., tabs vs spaces, naming conventions).

travel.meal_preference.description: Meal preference for flights and travel.

communication.preferred_channels.description: Preferred methods of communication (e.g., email, phone, text, slack).

location.default_temperature.description: Preferred temperature setting for a specific location (in Fahrenheit).

location.quiet_hours.description: Time range when the user prefers no notifications or disturbances at this location.
